settings.hero_headline: Linked pavé pillows, fully set with diamonds.
settings.hero_body: Linket små pavé puder fuld besat af diamanter. Necklace, bracelet, earrings, and studs, available in white gold, gold, and rose gold.

settings.label: THE EARRING
settings.subtext:
A single Pillow Boomrang earring, hand-set with 0.80 TW VVS-VS diamonds in 18K white gold. Worn left, worn right, worn both.

Sketched in Copenhagen, hand-set link by link in 18K gold at Vibe's workshop in Mumbai. A pavé surface so dense it catches light from every angle, meant to live with you.

settings.caption: Daily wear. Stacked, layered, left on overnight.
Each link is hand-set with 0.05 TW VVS-VS brilliants in 18K gold.

settings.label: THE BRACELET
settings.subtext:
The Pillow bracelet small. 2.02 carats of VVS-VS brilliants, set link by link, finished by hand in 18K gold.

Available in white gold, gold, and rose gold. Made to be worn alone or stacked with the rest of the series.

settings.label: Bridal
settings.heading: Planning a wedding?
settings.body: Vibe creates bespoke bridal pieces — engagement rings, wedding bands, and full bridal sets — designed with you from the first conversation.
